title: paphia brassii subsp. brassii
intro: Paphia brassii subsp. brassii, also known as Paphia, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Paphia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Paphia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed as a tea or added to topical creams and ointments.
